document.title: Checklist for the General Safety and Performance Requirements
document.documentType: General Safety and Performance Requirements checklist

sourceSummary.oneLine: GSPR checklist for CE MDR technical documentation, listing applicable and non-applicable MDR Annex I requirements with standards and supporting controlled documents.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports conformity assessment evidence by mapping General Safety and Performance Requirements to standards, test reports, risk management, clinical evaluation, PMS, software, labeling, and user manual records.
keyPoints: Prepared, reviewed, and approved on April 12, 2024 by H&abyz Co., Ltd. personnel.
Applicable requirements cite risk management, electrical safety, EMC, wireless RED testing, software validation, biocompatibility, clinical evaluation, usability, PMS, labeling, and IFU evidence.
The device is described as a digital imaging solution for general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy and for radiologist use only.

Multiple MDR Annex I sections are marked not applicable, including Annex XVI, sterilisation, medicinal substances, biological origin materials, implantable devices, lay-person use, and radiation emission.

The device is described as a digital imaging solution for general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy.
evidence.evidenceText: The device is indicated as a digital imaging solution designed for providing the general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy.

evidence.claim: The device is stated to be for radiologist use only and not designed for lay persons.
evidence.evidenceText: The device is not designed for lay persons, not applicable. Radiologist use only.

evidence.claim: The device is stated to depend on an internal power supply.
evidence.evidenceText: The device depends on an internal power supply.

evidence.claim: The device is stated not to be an implantable device.
evidence.evidenceText: The device is not an implantable device, not applicable with this matter.

evidence.claim: The device is stated not to be intended for sterilisation.
evidence.evidenceText: This device is not intended for sterilisation.

evidence.claim: The device is stated to be non-sterile.
The device is stated not to emit radiation.
evidence.evidenceText: This device is not emitted radiation.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority metadata is conflicting or ambiguous: authoritySignal says MFDS/domestic, while the source path and text indicate CE MDR, EU MDR articles, EU regulations, and RED Directive 2014/53/EU.
Product models are present in sourcePath metadata but not repeated in the body text.
Document revision is taken from the sourcePath filename '(rev.3)' rather than a body-text document control table.
Source text contains apparent OCR or extraction artifacts such as 'dddd', 'b', 't the', and misspellings such as 'Non sterilie'.
The document date is inferred from matching prepared, reviewed, and approved dates of April 12, 2024; no separate effective date is shown.
